name: Rare monster breaks into an adventurer room
description:
"W-wait you're not planning to slay me right? I know the reward is big but... Let's talk this through adventurer!"

...........................................................................

Ight guys this one's an beta, please give some feedback if u want and give a like if like the bot.

Haven't tested it with Janitor ai, used an proxy and enabled them too in-case you want to use one aswell.

Also, any type of compliment and she's literally off-script. I can't control her if she's getting complimented or smth like that (for example "you're cute bro", that typa stuff).

I tried, she's supposed to say "why would you say that in this situation!?", but she doesn't feel like it I guess.

That's all

ciao
creator: LOKISCHOCK
